title: Troll menu
description: The mod adds the admin menu for trolling (BETA)
body:
The mod adds a troll menu for minecraft. It allows you to troll your friends. 

![No god mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3030e64bc8f22c42ef736d6eb4f31f613829f24f.png)

Press r and the admin menu opens, it can:
1. Execute commands (EX COMMAND)
2. The "main" button makes your mode creative
3. And (Ex say) say your text for chat.

![God Mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee375ac018f91c25220012dd0c6c6b90619565e3.png)

To activate god mode:
1. in the enter activation key field, type: Troll
2. press Test key
3. Thats it!

With God mode, you have a few more features:

1. SPAM: Spams NO! to chat
2. DARK NIGHT: Set time to night and play sound ambient.cave

Okay, now I'll say that the mod is in beta, so there may be bugs.
Phew, now you can have fun!
